title: Appareil sonique Mod
description: Adds a vast amount of sonic devises from doctor who into minecraft
body:
# Appareil sonique

-------------------

This mod adds a variation of sonic devises from the hit sci-fi show doctor who and other popular doctor who media. First showing up in the 1968 story 'Fury from the Deep' and still being used to this day, the mod includes everything! (this is not a joke)

---------------

# Q&A

### Will this mod be ported to forge or neoforge?    
  
- No, even though ait has a forge version, this mod will be exclusivly for fabric. Why, i dont want to make 2 versions of the mod / port it to forge every version.

### Can this be ported to ... version?

- Nope, 1.20.1 is the perfect version for this and other dw mods (that dont have sonicscrewdrivers seem to be on this version). A 1.21 port may happen in the future but its not happening anytime soon.

### Can I make a custom sonic for the mod?

- Yes, but it has to meet my standards (basically just no sloppy models / textures)

### What does appareil sonique mean?

- It is 'sonic device' in french :)

------------------------------

## Currently Planned Sonics

- 2nd doctor
- 3rd doctor
- 4th doctor
- 5th, 6th, 7th doctors
- 8th doctor
- 8th (darkeyes)
- war
- 9th, 10th doctor (yellow and silver)
- 11th doctor
- 12th doctor
- 13th doctor
- 14th doctor
- 15th doctor (all colors (use mc dyes))
- sonic shades
- sonic troule
- sonic cane
- sonic lance
- romanas sonic
- lazer screwdriver
- sonic pen
- amy ponds sonic
- sonic lipstic
- sonic blaster
- rivers sonic
- vanilla sonics (blaze rod, redstone torch)
